sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2748" key="ai)sxunto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰσχυν-τός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n2748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shameful</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">189</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
